name: Google Sheets Sync (WASM)
description: Two-way sync entity field data with Google Sheets for team spreadsheet workflows and bulk editing.
author: BiloxiStudios

google_credentials_json.label: Google Service Account JSON
google_credentials_json.description: Contents of the service account credentials JSON file. Required for direct Google Sheets API access.

spreadsheet_id.label: Spreadsheet ID
spreadsheet_id.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID from the URL (the long string between /d/ and /edit)

auto_sync.label: Auto-Sync on Entity Changes
auto_sync.description: Automatically sync entity data to the spreadsheet when entities are created, updated, or deleted

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: Minutes between automatic full syncs. 0 to disable periodic sync.

entity_types.label: Entity Types to Sync
entity_types.description: Comma-separated entity types. Each type gets its own sheet tab.
